text: As I hear "See you next week!" while standing in this glass-walled, brightly lit, modern space, I feel a subtle sense of transition—caught between the present moment and the promise of return. The surrounding design and technology evoke curiosity and reflection about progress and human connection. There’s an unfamiliar, almost anticipatory stillness as I leave this room behind, and I am struck by how rooms—and the ideas within—await our return like silent witnesses to our ongoing search for meaning.
